overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed driving through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates highways, underpasses, elevated roads, and dense urban streets with distinctive cyberpunk architecture and digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: riding red motorcycle at high speed on open highway approaching the city, hands visible on handlebars with tattoo decals

entered.detail: large red digital billboard displaying 'CARNIVOROUS' text mounted on highway gantry
green billboard with 'BIG' text and product image on left side of highway
metal safety barrier running along left side of highway
metal safety barrier running along right side of highway
distant rocky mountains and desert terrain visible beyond the highway
futuristic city skyline with tall buildings visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving on a wide open highway with clear blue skies, passing large advertising billboards mounted on overhead gantries. The distant cyberpunk city skyline and desert mountain range are visible ahead as the motorcycle approaches the urban area at high speed, with metal guardrails lining both sides of the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete overpasses and stadium

events.description: entering dark underpass beneath concrete overpasses, lighting shifts to shadowed and artificial

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered highway section beneath massive concrete overpasses and bridge structures

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving parallel to ego vehicle on the right side

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure casting shadows overhead
large circular stadium building with metallic roof visible on left side
distinctive tall building with yellow illuminated grid pattern facade
vertical digital billboard with purple and yellow graphics

segments.scene_description: Driving through a semi-covered highway section beneath massive concrete overpasses and bridges. The lighting becomes significantly darker and shadowed, with a large circular stadium visible on the left and a distinctive yellow-grid skyscraper dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban surface streets with intersections and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting underpass into open urban area with intersections and palm trees
navigating through intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: navigating surface streets, making turns at intersections through the commercial urban environment

entered.detail: modern commercial building with glass facade on left side of street
industrial-style commercial building with concrete exterior on right
tall palm tree visible at intersection ahead
painted white crosswalk lines marking pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass onto sunlit surface streets with modern commercial buildings and palm trees. The motorcycle navigates through urban intersections with crosswalk markings and traffic lights, transitioning from the highway to city streets with visible sidewalks and street-level storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with safety railings and curved ramps

events.description: ascending ramp onto elevated highway with noticeable curve and acceleration

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway with high speed, taking curved ramps and overtaking slower vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, being approached for overtaking

entered.detail: metal safety railing along left edge of elevated highway
metal safety railing along right edge of elevated highway
concrete bridge structure passing overhead perpendicular to the highway
yellow and black striped safety barrier at curve entrance

segments.scene_description: Ascending onto an elevated highway with metal safety railings on both sides. The road curves through the urban landscape with overhead bridges and yellow-black striped barriers at the curves, maintaining high speed along the restricted-access roadway with the city skyline visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk city center with neon skyscrapers and monorail

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers and prominent neon signage

agents.ego_description: driving through the dense city center surrounded by tall cyberpunk buildings and digital billboards, navigating around other traffic

notable_agents.action: green SUV driving ahead in the same lane through city traffic

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with prominent pink neon lighting and digital displays
elevated monorail track structure running above the street
building with 'LOS OSOS' illuminated signage in green letters
line of palm trees along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Entering the heart of the cyberpunk city with towering skyscrapers featuring prominent pink neon signage and massive digital billboards. Palm trees line the streets as the motorcycle navigates through the dense urban canyon, passing under monorail tracks with the 'Los Osos' sign visible on a building to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from a bright, open highway into the dense, neon-lit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a wide asphalt road under clear blue skies, passing overhead advertising billboards with a distant city skyline and desert mountains ahead. As the motorcycle accelerates, the scene shifts into the heavy shadows of massive concrete overpasses and bridges, passing a large circular stadium and a yellow-grid skyscraper. The camera then emerges from the underpass onto sunlit surface streets lined with palm trees and commercial storefronts before ascending onto a curving elevated highway marked by yellow-black striped barriers. Finally, the environment transforms into a dense urban canyon of towering skyscrapers and monorail tracks, where the lighting shifts to vibrant pink neon signage and massive digital billboards.
